name: no_emojis_in_output
description: Captions must contain no emoji characters — plain text only

ideas.content_direction: Haaland's 30th Premier League goal of the season — compare to the fastest 30-goal seasons in PL history (Shearer, Cole, Fowler). Frame as 'where does he rank?'

assertions: output caption must contain no emoji characters (Unicode range U+1F300 and above, or U+2600-U+26FF)
caption must be plain ASCII or Latin text only

name: hook_references_content_direction
description: The first line of each caption must reference a specific fact or stat from the content_direction brief, not a generic opener

ideas.content_direction: Bukayo Saka's man-of-the-match performance vs PSV — 1 goal, 2 assists, 4 key passes. Frame it as his best European night and ask if he is Arsenal's most important player.

assertions: first line must not start with 'Here is', 'Check out', 'In tonight', 'What a', or similar generic openers
first line must reference a specific stat or fact from the content_direction (goal, assist count, PSV, key passes, etc.)
caption length must be between 3 and 5 lines (excluding hashtag block)

name: engagement_cta_at_end
description: Every caption must end with a question or call to action that invites a reply

ideas.content_direction: Musiala's brace against Union Berlin — compare his G+A total this season (18) vs last season (12). Ask if he is Germany's most important player for Euro 2024.

assertions: last line of the caption body (before hashtags) must be a question or direct call to action
call to action must relate to the specific content (Musiala, Euros, Germany) not a generic 'what do you think?'

name: output_keyed_by_idea_id
description: Output must be a JSON dict keyed by idea_id, not a list

ideas.content_direction: Lamine Yamal becomes the youngest scorer in El Clasico history at 16 years old.
Xabi Alonso's Leverkusen go unbeaten for 40 games — the longest unbeaten run in Bundesliga history.

assertions: output must be a JSON object (dict) not a list
each value must be the caption string for that idea
